summary:
Presale Summary for Baoh Consulting Ltd

Challenge:
Current on-premise bespoke ordering solution faced with challenges prompting consideration for migration to cloud.

Goals:
Achieve a successful migration to cloud to improve functionality, scalability, and user experience of the ordering system.

Constraints:
No detailed constraints provided yet.

Timeline:
No specific timeline was shared.

Recommended Next Steps:
Engage in detailed discussions to understand specific technical challenges and business objectives to tailor a cloud solution. Evaluate preferred cloud platforms and plan migration phases.

Contact Information:
Name: Bao Hoang
Company: Baoh Consulting Ltd
Email: baohoang.1988@gmail.com
Phone: 07928590809

Please provide any additional information or specific requirements you have to better assist you.
transcript: Hello! Welcome to Baoh Consulting. We are software consultants with over a decade of experience specializing in creative software solutions and integrating Generative AI technologies. We provide expertise in AI integration, bespoke software solutions, cloud solutions, IT support, digital transformation, website support and maintenance, and MVP development. I understand you are looking for help with cloud solutions. Could you please share more about the specific challenges you're facing with your current on-premise bespoke ordering solution and what you would like to achieve by migrating to the cloud?
